full_text:
Su Ze (Wenshi) 蘇則 (文師)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Su Ze (蘇則), styledWenshi (文師), was born in Youfufeng. Considered Wei’s best frontier General, fiercely honest. Died after argument with Cao Pi. Su Ze was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Su Ze lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
